question: Table – Daily Wages of 5 Workers Over 4 Days Q: What is the average daily earning of Worker C? Day A B C D E Day 1 200 180 220 160 190 Day 2 210 175 230 170 195 Day 3 190 185 215 180 200 Day 4 220 190 225 175 205

question: The number of students in two sections A and B having different heights is shown in the table given below: Height (in metres) Section A Section B 1.55 5 4 1.60 9 8 1.62 11 13 1.65 14 10 1.68 6 7 1.71 7 5 1.75 4 3 What is the ratio of the total number of students in Section A whose height is less than 1.65 metres to the total number of students in Section B whose height is less than 1.65 metres?
